title: Aave - Open App
meta_description: Aave app access for token swaps, collateral swaps, supply, borrow, and position management. Verify app.aave.com before connecting.
hero_h2: Swap collateral and manage DeFi positions
hero_lead: Aave lets users access a non-custodial liquidity protocol for supplying, borrowing, and swap-enabled position management across supported onchain markets.
what_is: Aave is a decentralised non-custodial liquidity protocol where suppliers provide liquidity and borrowers access liquidity by providing collateral, as described in the Aave documentation. The official interface also exposes swap tools for tokens and position management where supported.

how.d: Use app.aave.com and confirm the domain before connecting a wallet.
Select the network and market shown by the interface; available assets and swap flows vary by market.
Use token swap, collateral swap, repay with collateral, debt swap, or withdraw and swap when available.
Check route provider, minimum received, approvals, health factor effects, and network costs before signing.

points.p: Move between assets, collateral, debt, or exit flows without treating each transaction as an isolated trade.
The swap features page describes ParaSwap or CoW Protocol routing depending on network availability.
It sits in the broader DeFi stack, where wallet approvals, market parameters, and network costs should be checked before signing.

faq.a: Aave is a non-custodial liquidity protocol for supplying crypto assets and borrowing against collateral; the app also includes swap-related position tools where supported.
Yes. The Aave swap documentation describes token swaps plus collateral, debt, and withdraw-and-swap flows, with providers depending on network availability.

faq.q: Is this the official Aave app?
faq.a: No. This landing page points to app.aave.com, the Aave V3 app linked from aave.com; verify the domain before connecting.
Supported markets are selected inside the app and can change through governance; check the market selector and documented addresses before signing.
No. Smart contract, oracle, collateral, network, liquidation, and market risks may apply; review the risk documentation and use your own judgment.

footer_note: This page is not the official Aave app; verify app.aave.com before connecting a wallet; educational only, not financial advice.
